SCHEDULE_PIX_INITIAL_LOAD_ERROR.title: Unable to load
SCHEDULE_PIX_INITIAL_LOAD_ERROR.message: We couldn't find your contacts. Please try again later.

SCHEDULE_PIX_INVALID_DATE.title: Invalid date
SCHEDULE_PIX_INVALID_DATE.message: Please select a future date for the scheduled transfer. Today's date is not allowed.

SCHEDULE_PIX_VALUE_TOO_HIGH.title: Amount exceeds limit
SCHEDULE_PIX_VALUE_TOO_HIGH.message: The scheduled amount cannot exceed R$ 5,000.00.

SCHEDULE_PIX_FUTURE_DATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: Date limit reached
SCHEDULE_PIX_FUTURE_DATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.message: The limit for scheduled transfers on this date has already been reached.

SCHEDULE_PIX_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.title: Insufficient funds
SCHEDULE_PIX_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.message: There are not enough funds to complete this transfer on the scheduled date.

SCHEDULE_PIX_DESTINATION_NOT_FOUND.title: Recipient not found
SCHEDULE_PIX_DESTINATION_NOT_FOUND.message: We couldn't find the recipient. Please check the Pix key.

SCHEDULE_PIX_CONNECTION_ERROR.title: Connection issue
SCHEDULE_PIX_CONNECTION_ERROR.message: Unable to schedule the transfer. Please check your connection and try again.

SCHEDULE_PIX_AUTHENTICATION_ERROR.title: Authentication failed
SCHEDULE_PIX_AUTHENTICATION_ERROR.message: Your session has expired or the password is incorrect. Please try again.

SCHEDULE_PIX_UNEXPECTED_ERROR.title: Scheduling failed
SCHEDULE_PIX_UNEXPECTED_ERROR.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try scheduling later.

SCHEDULE_PIX_CANT_CANCEL_TODAY.title: Cannot cancel
SCHEDULE_PIX_CANT_CANCEL_TODAY.message: This scheduled transfer is already being processed and cannot be cancelled.

SCHEDULE_PIX_SUCCESS.title: Scheduling confirmed
SCHEDULE_PIX_SUCCESS.message: Your Pix transfer has been successfully scheduled for the selected date.

SCHEDULE_PIX_CANCEL_SUCCESS.title: Scheduling cancelled
SCHEDULE_PIX_CANCEL_SUCCESS.message: The Pix transfer has been successfully cancelled.

SCHEDULE_PIX_INSTANT_TRANSFER_PROMPT.title: Transfer for today
SCHEDULE_PIX_INSTANT_TRANSFER_PROMPT.message: Do you want to make this transfer now or schedule it for a future date?

SCHEDULE_PIX_INSTANT_TRANSFER_DECLINED.title: Scheduling complete
SCHEDULE_PIX_INSTANT_TRANSFER_DECLINED.message: Your Pix transfer has been scheduled for the selected future date.
